2022-23 New Mexico State Aggies Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 9-15 (2-10, 13th in WAC MBB)

Coach: Greg Heiar

PS/G: 73.7 (130th of 363)

PA/G: 71.7 (232nd of 363)

SRS: -1.55 (183rd of 363)

SOS: 2.44 (107th of 363)

ORtg: 102.9 (214th of 363)

DRtg: 100.1 (124th of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
